cot_prefix: Okay, let's read through this passage carefully to find out how many Palestinian prisoners had been released by Wednesday. The article starts by saying, "Israel freed 26 Palestinian prisoners early Wednesday, the second of four groups to be released as part of an agreement..." So this tells us that on Wednesday, 26 prisoners were released, and this was the second group out of four groups. Also, the article says, "In all, 104 prisoners are to be released in four rounds over the coming months." But the question is specifically asking how many had been released by Wednesday. Since Wednesday's release was the second group and 26 prisoners were freed that day, the total number released by Wednesday would be the first group plus the second group. However, the first group isn't directly mentioned in the passage. The passage only mentions that 26 prisoners were released on Wednesday and that this was the second group. So, the passage only explicitly states that 26 prisoners were released on Wednesday, and that this was the second of four groups. It doesn't provide the number of prisoners in the first group.
